name: (Set of 2) 24" x 24" Framed Canvas Black - Threshold™: Modern Style, Digital Abstract Art, Vertical Polystyrene Frame
description:
Add modern flair to your living space with the (Set of 2) 24" x 24" Framed Canvas in Black from Threshold. This gorgeous piece of art is the perfect size to be displayed on its own or with other artwork as part of a gallery wall. You could even prop it up against the wall on a cabinet or side table to bring any area to life.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
